sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n27364" key="diplasiepitrite/tartos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διπλᾰσι-επιτρῐτέταρτος</orth>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0358.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope> </bibl> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0358.tlg001:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3</biblScope> </bibl>/<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0358.tlg001:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4</biblScope> </bibl> <sense id="n27364.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">times as great,</tr_> ibid.:</sense> </entryFree>
